incorrects.description: Student placed incorrect tiles on first attempt

steps.text: Not quite. Count the boxes, count what's inside each, then look at the total. Product goes first in this template.

incorrects.description: Student placed incorrect tiles on second attempt

steps.text: Let's count together. 3 boxes. Each box has 8 cookies. 3 times 8 is 24. The reversed template puts 24 first, then the equal sign, then 3 times 8.

incorrects.description: Student placed incorrect tiles three or more times. System models the answer.

params.description: System demonstrates placing tiles: 24 in product slot, 3 in groups slot, 8 in items slot.

steps.text: Let me show you. I count 3 boxes. Each box has 8 cookies. 3 times 8 equals 24. In the reversed template, the product 24 goes first. Then equals. Then 3 times 8. Same value on both sides.
